penalties.description: Loop appears to be positioned slightly off the marked line on appendage

confidence_rationale: Good visualization of loop deployment and cinching process. Loop position relative to mark estimated from available camera angle. Task completion clearly observable.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter measurement of loop deviation from mark due to camera angle and resolution
Whether marking line is precisely visible on foam appendage
technique_summary: Competent intermediate-level performance with good instrument control and loop deployment. Total time of 60 seconds falls within intermediate range. Primary penalty from slight loop positioning off target mark.
strengths: Good instrument coordination between graspers and scissors
Controlled cinching technique without excessive force
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more precise loop positioning relative to marked target line
Practice faster loop deployment to achieve expert timing benchmarks
